channel.title: 4worm.com - Forum Updates
channel.description: Latest security updates, white hat pen testing discussions, and vulnerability disclosures

item.title: Critical Security Patch Released for Apache Log4j
item.author: SecurityTeam
item.description: A critical vulnerability has been discovered in Apache Log4j (CVE-2021-44228). All users are advised to update immediately.

item.title: OWASP Top 10 2021 - What Changed?
item.author: PenTestPro
item.description: Discussion of changes in OWASP Top 10 2021 compared to 2017, including focus on insecure deserialization.

item.title: XSS Vulnerability in User Profile Page
item.author: BugHunter01
item.description: Found a reflected XSS vulnerability in the user profile update functionality allowing arbitrary JavaScript execution.
